name: Sprott Physical Gold Trust
description: Sprott Physical Gold Trust (PHYS) is a closed-end trust that invests in unencumbered and fully allocated physical gold bullion. The Trust was created to provide a secure, convenient, and exchange-traded investment alternative for investors who want to hold physical gold without the inconvenience that is typical of a direct investment in physical gold bullion. PHYS offers a unique redemption feature, allowing unitholders to redeem their units for physical gold bullion on a monthly basis, subject to certain minimum requirements. The gold is held in custody by the Royal Canadian Mint, a Federal Crown Corporation of the Government of Canada.
